attacks.text: Look at the top 20 cards of your deck and attach any number of Energy cards you find there to your Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

attacks.name: Unified Beatdown
attacks.text: If you go second, you can't use this attack during your first turn. This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Crown Opal
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic non-Colorless Pokémon.

attacks.name: Myriad Leaf Shower
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to both Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Teal Dance
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may attach a Basic Grass Energy card from your hand to this Pokémon. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, draw a card.

attacks.name: Destructive Flame
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fighting Blaze
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex or Pokémon V, this attack does 90 more damage.

attacks.name: Spiral Drain
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fighting Whirlpool
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex or Pokémon V, this attack does 90 more damage.

attacks.name: Linear Attack
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Fighting Lightning
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex or Pokémon V, this attack does 90 more damage.

attacks.name: Leaflet Blessings
attacks.text: Attach a Basic Grass Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, heal all damage from that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Permeating Chill
attacks.text: At the end of your opponent's next turn, put 9 damage counters on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Mystical Return
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. Shuffle that Pokémon and all attached cards into their deck.

attacks.name: Disarming Voice
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

abilities.name: Boosted Evolution
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, it can evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.

abilities.name: Rainbow DNA
abilities.text: This Pokémon can evolve into any Pokémon ex that evolves from Eevee if you play it from your hand onto this Pokémon. (This Pokémon can't evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.)

attacks.name: Blood Moon
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

abilities.name: Seasoned Skill
abilities.text: Blood Moon used by this Pokémon costs Colorless less for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

attacks.name: Winding Waves
attacks.text: You may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Tidal Surge
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rising Horns
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: Time Bellow
attacks.text: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Metal Blast
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Back Draft
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each Basic Energy card in your opponent's discard pile.

attacks.name: Flamebody Cannon
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack also does 90 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Flashing Draw
abilities.text: You must discard a Basic Lightning Energy from this Pokémon in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

abilities.name: Inviting Wink
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may have your opponent reveal their hand and you put any number of Basic Pokémon you find there onto their Bench.

attacks.name: Dynamic Press
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 80 damage to itself.

abilities.name: Extra Helpings
abilities.text: Attacks used by your Hop's Pokémon do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). The effect of Extra Helpings doesn't stack.

attacks.name: Silent Wing
attacks.text: Your opponent reveals their hand.

attacks.name: Kick Shot
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Gyro Shockwave
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Nab 'n' Dash
attacks.text: Search your deck for a number of cards up to the number of your Benched Pokémon and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Insta-Strike
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Brave Slash
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Brave Slash.

attacks.name: Thunderous Bolt
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

abilities.name: Electric Streamer
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic Lightning Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Iono's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Full Moon Rondo
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

abilities.name: Fairy Zone
abilities.text: The Weakness of each of your opponent's Dragon Pokémon in play is now Psychic. (Apply Weakness as ×2.)

attacks.name: Burning Darkness
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

abilities.name: Infernal Reign
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 3 Basic Fire Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Revenge Buster
attacks.text: If your Benched Pokémon have any damage counters on them, this attack does 120 more damage.

attacks.name: Steel Armament
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Metal Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Slashing Strike
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Slashing Strike.

attacks.name: Pluck Off
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Grass Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Hammer Whip
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Full Speed
attacks.text: Discard your hand and draw 6 cards.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Rocket Mirror
attacks.text: Move all damage counters from 1 of your Benched Team Rocket's Pokémon to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spiky Wheel
attacks.text: This attack does 40 more damage for each Darkness Energy attached to this Pokémon.
